headquarters: New York, New York, United States
name: The Estée Lauder Companies Inc.
summary: The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. is a global manufacturer and marketer of skincare, makeup, fragrance, and hair care products. The company operates through several segments including Prestige Beauty, which encompasses skincare, makeup, and fragrance brands. It is one of the world's leading beauty companies with a portfolio of over 25 brands.
